overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit futuristic urban commercial district in Night City. The character navigates sidewalks beneath elevated highways, crosses streets, and passes through areas with towering corporate buildings, holographic billboards, and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with commercial billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with support columns
large digital billboard displaying CIRRUS advertisement with red and white text
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
yellow commercial van driving on the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic commercial district. Large digital billboards and palm trees line the street while a yellow van drives past. The area is partially shaded by the overhead structure.

events.description: character performs 180-degree turn to face opposite direction
character steps onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: turning around and crossing the street toward the Senate Ave intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow van continues driving along the street

entered.detail: street sign reading Senate Ave mounted on orange pole

segments.scene_description: The character turns around at the intersection and crosses the street. The Senate Ave sign becomes visible on the left as the character navigates the crosswalk. The elevated highway structure now appears on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial boulevard with corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and billboards

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades dominating the skyline
large digital advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a wide commercial boulevard lined with towering corporate buildings and holographic billboards. The street is relatively clear with sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic. Palm trees now line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district with black tower and street-level shops

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the imposing black corporate tower

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving down the street

entered.detail: massive black building with vertical red accent stripes and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a distinctive black corporate tower with red vertical stripes. A blue sports car drives by on the left while street-level shops appear on the right. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with AVANTE building and debris

events.description: entering narrower alley area with increased debris and ground-level shops

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrower commercial alley with scattered trash and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with distinctive teal roof and AVANTE signage
classic blue sedan parked on the street
scattered trash bags, cardboard boxes, and discarded items
concrete blocks and caution tape blocking off an area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower commercial alley featuring the AVANTE building with its teal roof. The area shows signs of urban decay with debris piles and construction barriers. A blue vintage car is parked on the left while pedestrians continue down the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic commercial district that transitions from the shadow of massive infrastructure into a dense urban corridor of corporate towers and decaying alleys. It begins beneath a towering elevated highway where digital billboards and palm trees line the shaded street as a yellow van drives past. As the character turns at an intersection, the camera crosses the street past a Senate Ave sign, shifting the highway structure to the left before opening onto a wide boulevard flanked by holographic displays and soaring corporate architecture. The scene then proceeds past a black tower with red vertical stripes and a passing blue sports car, moving toward a distant pedestrian bridge. Finally, the path narrows into a commercial alley featuring the teal-roofed AVANTE building, where the polished corporate aesthetic gives way to urban decay marked by debris piles and construction barriers.
